This is a testharness.js-based test.

  assert_equals: Check expected offsetLeft expected -200 but got 0

  assert_equals: Check expected offsetHeight expected 600 but got 400

  assert_equals: Check expected offsetLeft expected -200 but got -100
[FAIL] Offsets for position-area: span-all center
  assert_equals: Check expected offsetHeight expected 600 but got 400
[FAIL] Offsets for position-area: span-right span-all
  assert_equals: Check expected offsetHeight expected 600 but got 400

  assert_equals: Check expected offsetHeight expected 600 but got 400

  assert_equals: Check expected offsetLeft expected -200 but got 0

  assert_equals: Check expected offsetLeft expected -200 but got 0
[FAIL] Offsets for position-area: center span-all
  assert_equals: Check expected offsetLeft expected -200 but got 0
[FAIL] Offsets for position-area: span-bottom span-all
  assert_equals: Check expected offsetLeft expected -200 but got 0
[FAIL] Offsets for position-area: bottom span-all
  assert_equals: Check expected offsetLeft expected -200 but got 0
